headline: How Does LLY Stock Reach $2,100?
summary: At $1,189, Eli Lilly (LLY) looks set up for roughly 76% of upside over the next three years under a conservative scenario. That is a move large enough to justify digging into where it comes from. Revenue compounding does the work, but the multiple takes a meaningful cut along the way. Here is the operational reality the math is built on.
